title: VibeOS Worktree Scope Manifest
description: Defines per-branch exclusive territories and shared paths for parallel worktree execution. Read at runtime by worktree-bash-guard.sh and worktree-scope-guard.sh.

branches.description: Map of branch name → scope definition. Keys must be feat/* branch names.

wo_ids.description: Work order IDs owned by this branch.

exclusive_paths.description: File paths or path prefixes that only this branch may edit. Other branches are blocked by worktree-scope-guard.sh.

alembic_versions.description: Optional. Alembic migration filename prefixes owned by this branch. Informational — not enforced by gates.

description.description: Human-readable summary of this branch's scope and purpose.

shared_paths.description: File paths or path prefixes that any branch may edit. Expect merge conflicts on these — resolve via rebase. Add any file touched by multiple WOs here.
